content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a GitHub PR comment event where the user (@cmungall) is asking me to re-review the Atelosteogenesis Type III curation after their latest commit that addressed the issues I found in my previous review.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request - the user wants me to analyze the updated disorder file and provide feedback on whether the issues have been resolved.

c. **Key information**:
   - PR adds new disorder entry for Atelosteogenesis Type III
   - User claims to have fixed all title snippets with verbatim abstract quotes
   - Added inheritance_term and FLNB gene_term
   - Expanded phenotypes from PMID:1442028
   - Added diagnosis + supportive airway management sections
   - My previous review identified critical issues with evidence snippets being titles instead of abstract quotes

d. **Main tasks**:
   - Read the updated disorder YAML file
   - Check if evidence snippets are now proper abstract quotes
   - Verify phenotype expansion
   - Check for added inheritance_term and gene_term
   - Review diagnosis and treatment sections
   - Provide updated review feedback

e. **Plan of action**:
   - Update comment with todo list
   - Read the updated disorder file
   - Read cached reference abstracts to verify snippets
   - Compare against my previous review findings
   - Provide comprehensive updated review feedback
   - No implementation needed - this is a review task

f. **Limitations**: None for this review task - I have all the tools needed to read files and provide feedback.
</analysis>

input.body: ### Re-Review: Atelosteogenesis Type III Curation **Tasks:** - [ ] Read updated disorder YAML file - [ ] Verify evidence snippets are now abstract quotes (not titles) - [ ] Check phenotype expansion - [ ] Review inheritance_term and gene_term additions - [ ] Review diagnosis and treatment sections - [ ] Compile updated review feedback --- Analyzing the reworked curation...
